creator: frank@dynamical-systems.org
text:
Update 0.4.12 -> 0.5.9

Added files:
files/patch-configure

NOTE: This version optionally uses GraphicsMagick for foreground color
reduction, see the pdf2djvu manpage. I didn't care about this, I leave
it to the maintainer to decide whether GraphicsMagick should be included
as an optional dependency for pdf2djvu.
